verification_sources.evidence: Page presents a RAG governance framework, published 2026-02-20 and updated 2026-02-26, with rules for source qualification, provenance, freshness, and retrieval not equaling authorization.
FINOS AI Governance Framework describes source traceability, source vetting, metadata preservation, and link-rot/versioning considerations for RAG citations.

verifications.reason: The candidate aligns with independent citation/source-traceability governance guidance, but it is not GlobalCloud canonical policy.

verification_sources.evidence: Official national standard page verifies GB/T 39256-2020, title, current status, publication date 2020-11-19, implementation date 2021-03-01, competent body, and issuing bodies.

verifications.reason: The commercial mirror should not be canonical, but the standard identity and status were verified against the official SAMR/SAC public standard registry.

verification_sources.evidence: Vendor glossary page describes MES as a runtime control layer and discusses traceability, evidence capture, and execution gates, updated January 2026.

verifications.reason: The source is vendor explanatory material and cannot define GlobalCloud GFIS source-of-record behavior or architecture boundaries.
verifications.required_next_action: Use internal GFIS runtime evidence or controlled architecture documents for source-of-record claims.

verification_sources.evidence: Repository page identifies AEGIS Governance MCP server, public repository, 7 commits, MIT license file present in navigation, and README describing six-gate quantitative decision evaluation with hash-chained audit trails.

verifications.reason: The repository is relevant as a tool candidate for governance gates, but it is not WAES policy and still requires legal/security review before use.

verification_sources.evidence: Project metadata verifies package name agent-reach, version 1.5.0, MIT license declaration, Python >=3.10, and project scripts.
Repository documentation describes Agent Reach as one-click internet access with installation and health-check routing.

verifications.reason: The official repository metadata aligns with the isolated PoC version and license evidence, but this still does not prove production integration.
